stemHtml: Two aircraft of the same type are intending to land on a runway with a tailwind. In terms of brakes, which aircraft is more likely to be able to land?

options.a: The one fitted with steel brakes because it has a better braking efficiency.
options.b: The one fitted with steel brakes because of its resistant to heat.
options.c: The one fitted with carbon brakes because of its resistant to heat.
options.d: The one fitted with carbon brakes because it requires several brake applications.
